# Dataset summary

This dataset contains the domain data from the [`tau2-bench`](https://github.com/sierra-research/tau2-bench) repository for agentic evaluation.

To download it in your code, run:

```python
hf download HuggingFaceH4/tau2-bench-data --repo-type dataset --local-dir data/tau2
```
